prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9344f635`.
codex_response:
Rule: each 2-cell vertical domino expands to a full column of its color, and each 2-cell horizontal domino expands to a full row of its color. Horizontal rows are painted after columns, so row stripes win at intersections.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` “template row” framing; that mismatch is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9344f635/notes.md). No new primitive was needed. The generator keeps the official family shape by using square `7`-background grids with sparse, non-touching 2-cell witnesses, separated vertical stripe-columns, and 1-4 horizontal stripe-rows with occasional repeated row colors.

- Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9344f635/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9344f635/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9344f635/generator.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9344f635/notes.md)
